_publications._publicationTitle: Identifying Symptoms of Distress in Youth Living with Neurofibromatosis Type 1 (NF1).

_contextSnippet: Caregiver distress was identified on the BSI with 12.5% meeting criteria for a 'case' (t-score greater or equal to 63) on somatization, 11.3% for anxiety, and 3.8% for depression and 8.8% for the Global Severity Index. Overall, 8.8% met 'case' criteria on the BSI.
details: Caregiver distress identified with 12.5% meeting criteria for 'case' (t-score ≥63) on somatization, 11.3% for anxiety, 3.8% for depression, and 8.8% for Global Severity Index. Overall, 8.8% met 'case' criteria
